ogTitle: Lake Cargelligo vs Lake Cathie: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Lake Cargelligo and Lake Cathie.
heading: Lake Cargelligo vs Lake Cathie — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Lake Cargelligo, New South Wales and Lake Cathie, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Lake Cargelligo has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Lake Cathie (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Lake Cargelligo or Lake Cathie safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Lake Cargelligo has a flood risk score of 51/100, while Lake Cathie scores 48/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Lake Cargelligo scores 36/100 for bushfire risk. Lake Cathie scores 27/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Lake Cargelligo or Lake Cathie?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Lake Cargelligo has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.55% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
